name: Tectonic Metals Inc.
description: Tectonic Metals Inc. is a mineral exploration company focused on the identification, acquisition, and development of high-potential mineral properties, primarily in the United States and Canada. Led by an experienced team with a proven track record of wealth creation, the company specializes in large-scale, intrusion-hosted gold systems. Tectonic Metals is committed to responsible exploration practices, maintaining strategic partnerships with Alaska Native Corporations, and delivering value to shareholders through disciplined project advancement and technical excellence in Tier 1 mining jurisdictions. The company is headquartered in Vancouver, British Columbia, and is publicly traded on the TSX Venture Exchange.
